CREATE TABLE test_dict (key VARCHAR(255), value INTEGER);

CREATE FUNCTION DB.DBA.TEST_DICT_INC_OR_PUT (INOUT dict_key VARCHAR(255), INOUT value_increment INTEGER, value_decrement INTEGER) RETURNS VOID { dict_inc_or_put(test_dict, dict_key, value_increment, value_decrement); };
SET key_result = 'key1'; SET increment_result = 3; CALL DB.DBA.TEST_DICT_INC_OR_PUT(key_result, increment_result, 0);
SET key_result = 'key2'; SET increment_result = 5; CALL DB.DBA.TEST_DICT_INC_OR_PUT(key_result, increment_result, 0);
SET key_result = 'key3'; SET increment_result = 1; CALL DB.DBA.TEST_DICT_INC_OR_PUT(key_result, increment_result, 0);
SET key_result = 'key4'; SET increment_result = 8; CALL DB.DBA.TEST_DICT_INC_OR_PUT(key_result, increment_result, 0);
SET key_result = 'key1'; SET increment_result = 0; CALL DB.DBA.TEST_DICT_INC_OR_PUT(key_result, increment_result, 2);
SET key_result = 'invalid_key'; SET increment_result = 'invalid'; CALL DB.DBA.TEST_DICT_INC_OR_PUT(key_result, increment_result, 0);
UPDATE test_dict SET value = value + 5 WHERE key = 'key2';
CREATE VIEW view_dict AS SELECT key, value FROM test_dict WHERE value > 0;
